name: Homemade Candy Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one-third of the crackers (about 25) in the bottom of an ungreased 13x9x2-inch pan.
2. In a saucepan over medium-high heat, melt the butter. Add milk, graham cracker crumbs, and sugars; bring to a boil.
3. Boil, stirring constantly, for 5 minutes.
4. Pour half of the mixture over the crackers, carefully spreading to cover.
5. Place half of the remaining crackers (about 25) on top. Spread with the remaining sugar mixture.
6. Top with the remaining crackers.
7. In a saucepan over low heat, stir the peanut butter and chips until melted and smooth. Spread over the crackers.
8. Chill until firm, about 1 hour.
9. Cut into small squares.
Yield: 3-4 dozen
